assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands for current versions (gcloud container clusters describe), node status (kubectl get nodes), and cluster health (kubectl get pods -n kube-system)

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Section 1.2 includes the exact command: 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR.validVersions)"' to check available versions in Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Section 1.3 includes the specific command 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' to check for deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.31 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: The response assumes upgrading from 1.32 to 1.33 (not to 1.31 as expected). The control plane upgrade command uses --master flag correctly but targets 1.33, not 1.31

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Section 2.3 includes verification commands (gcloud container clusters describe, kubectl get pods -n kube-system) with explanations of expected outputs

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Sections 3.2 and 3.5 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools (default-pool and workload-pool) with 'gcloud container node-pools upgrade' commands

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Sections 3.3 and 3.6 include monitoring commands like 'watch kubectl get nodes -o wide' and 'gcloud container operations list' to track upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.30→1.31→1.32) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The response does not provide sequential control plane upgrades. It assumes starting from 1.32 and going to 1.33 in a single step, not the expected 1.30→1.31→1.32 sequence

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation with commands to check node versions, pod health (kubectl get pods -A), and kube-system pods status

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: The response includes both a 'Troubleshooting Common Issues' section and an 'Emergency Rollback' section with specific commands and procedures for rollback scenarios
